name: TableViewSettingsFilterComponent
description:
View settings dialog filter component.

```html
<!-- With custom form -->
<fdp-table-view-settings-filter
    column="name"
    label="Name"
    type="custom">
        <ng-container *fdpViewSettingsFilterCustomDef="let model">
            <label>Enter name:</label>
            <fdp-input type="text" name="name" [(ngModel)]="model.name"></fdp-input>
        </ng-container>
</fdp-table-view-settings-filter>

<!-- Single select -->
<fdp-table-view-settings-filter
    column="status"
    label="Status"
    type="single-select"
    values="[{value: 'OUT_OF_STOCK', label: 'Out of stock'}, { value: 'AVAILABLE', label: 'Available'}]">
</fdp-table-view-settings-filter>
```

inputs.name: column
inputs.description: Table column name on which to filter.

inputs.name: values
inputs.description: Selection values for 'single-select' or 'multi-select' filter types.
